title: De-contaminate is_northmarq — SIDE-RECONCILED + NM-broker guard (APPLIED dia)
status: dia: Scott-gated subset APPLIED live 2026-06-09. gov: report-only (columns added, no flips).
guard_doctrine: The SF Deal 'side' may only PROMOTE (competitor/ambiguous -> NM) or resolve a genuinely-ambiguous row. It must NEVER override an explicit NM listing-broker string: never demote-to-buyside or remove a sale whose own listing_broker matches the NM/SJC/Stan Johnson/Briggs/Stinson/Gartman token (or a known NM individual). A conflicting Deal 'buyer' tag on such a row is a +/-1.5% cross-attribution to a same-metro neighbor, not ground truth.

method.step2_side: sf_deal_export (data.xlsx Direct_Co_Broke). Listing = Direct(Both)/Co-Broke(Seller); buy-side = Co-Broke(Buyer); absent = HOLD.
method.step3_guard: Apply the NM-broker guard AFTER the side lookup — it overrides a 'buyer'/competitor verdict for NM-listed sales.
method.matcher: Comp->sale: state + date +/-120d + price +/-6%, confirm city OR tenant OR <=25mi geocoded proximity. Deal->sale side at tight +/-1.5% price.

nm_broker_guard_keep_true.422: SJC; Butler — NM-listed; Deal Buyer tag = cross-attribution (exact-matches Comp Fresenius-Birmingham-AL $1.37M).
nm_broker_guard_keep_true.8858: SJC; Scrivner — NM-listed (surfaced by the guard; not in Scott's named list).
nm_broker_guard_keep_true.5191: Will Lightfoot = NM/SJC broker (named, not a token) — matches Comp Fresenius-Edmond-OK $2.67M.

verified_removal_pending_nod.5004: Colliers (competitor). Verified genuine non-match: only Comp candidate was a Round Rock Satellite Healthcare deal (~80mi, different tenant). Removal recommended; held for Scott's explicit nod.

flag_for_objection.5420: PH: Peranich & Huffman — flipped to buyside as a non-NM firm; revert if it is in fact NM.

dia_held.flagged_comp_unmatched_non_competitor: ~211 (75 NM/SJC/Briggs broker KEEP / 66 null / ~70 other) — not stripped.

matcher_weakness_found: The strict 1:1 resolution (one comp per sale) starved 8327/13137 of their true NM comp (claimed by a higher-ranked sale), wrongly bucketing them as competitor removes in v2. Caught by Scott + the targeted re-match. The guard + per-sale verification now prevent NM comps from being removed.

topic20_value_prop.conclusion: Reproduces deck 6.38% on the side-reconciled NM listing set (6.40%); buy-side (6.10%) correctly excluded.

gov.status: REPORT-ONLY. is_northmarq_source + is_northmarq_buyside columns ADDED (no flips). Awaiting a gov Deal/Opportunity export (companion to the gov Comp file) to do the same listing-vs-buyside reconciliation.
gov.cap_finding: No Internal-vs-DB basis contradiction (export 8.00% = matched DB 8.00% = current flags 7.90%); deck 6.78% is a different cohort/aggregation.
